0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Data Flow"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"How information moves through Mnemosyne's memory tiers."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Write Path"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Agent Input] -->|remember| WM[Working Memory]\n  WM -->|index| FI[FTS5 Index]\n  WM -->|sleep| SC[Sleep Consolidator]\n  SC -->|promote| EM[Episodic Memory]\n  EM -->|index| VI[Vector Index + FTS5]\n  SC -->|evict| DEL[Deleted]\n"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Agent calls ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]]}]," with content, source, importance, and optional metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]," stores the raw entry with metadata in SQLite"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"FTS5 index"}]," is updated for full-text search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sleep consolidation"}]," (triggered by calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}],") processes older entries"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotion"}]," summarizes and moves entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector + FTS5 indexing"}]," occurs on the new Episodic entries"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}]," removes the original Working Memory entries"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Read Path"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  Q[Query] -->|recall| RE[Retrieval Engine]\n  RE -->|vector search| VI[sqlite-vec Index]\n  RE -->|text search| FI[FTS5 Index]\n  VI -->|scores| RF[Rank Fusion]\n  FI -->|scores| RF\n  RF -->|ranked results| A[Agent]\n"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":["Agent calls ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall(query, top_k=5)"}]]}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query is embedded"}]," using BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 (384 dims) for vector search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Parallel dispatch"}]," to vector (sqlite-vec) and text (FTS5) indices"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank Fusion"}]," combines scores: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec×0.5 + fts×0.3 + importance×0.2"}],", then applies recency decay: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score × (0.7 + 0.3 × recency_decay)"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent receives"}]," ranked results"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Flow"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  START[sleep called] --> SELECT[Select entries older than TTL/2]\n  SELECT --> GROUP[Group by source]\n  GROUP --> SUMMARIZE[Summarize via LLM or AAAK]\n  SUMMARIZE --> PROMOTE[Store summary in Episodic Memory]\n  PROMOTE --> INDEX[Index new episodic entry]\n  INDEX --> EVICT[Evict originals from Working Memory]\n"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Consolidation is triggered explicitly by calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Select"}]," Working Memory entries older than TTL/2 (default 12 hours)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group"}]," candidates by their source field"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}]," each group via LLM (if enabled) or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}]," the summary as a new Episodic Memory entry (with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," tracking)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Index"}]," the new entry in vector and FTS5 indices"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}]," the original entries from Working Memory"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Event Lifecycle"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Stage"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Location"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Trigger"}],"$L3"]}]}],"$L4"]}]],["$L5"],"$L6"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"g5bZS3Y5ARiiH67_4HyLc"}
3:["$","th",null,{"children":"Duration"}]
